name: Security Service Enumeration via sc.exe - Multiple Security Services Queried
description: Detects sc.exe querying multiple security-relevant Windows services (WinDefend, wscsvc, VSS, wbengine) within a short time window. This reconnaissance pattern is used by ransomware and APT groups before disabling defenses. Covers T1489 and T1562.001 pre-attack reconnaissance.
query:
sequence by host.id, process.parent.pid with maxspan=60s
  [process where process.name == "sc.exe" and process.command_line like~ "*query*WinDefend*"]
  [process where process.name == "sc.exe" and process.command_line like~ "*query*" and process.command_line like~ "*wscsvc*" or process.command_line like~ "*VSS*" or process.command_line like~ "*wbengine*"]
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: Service Stop Command Targeting Security or Backup Services
description: Detects sc.exe or net.exe stop/disable commands targeting high-value security services including Windows Defender (WinDefend), Windows Security Center (wscsvc), Volume Shadow Copy (VSS), and Windows Backup Engine (wbengine). Stopping these services is a hallmark behavior of ransomware families including LockBit, Conti, REvil, and BlackCat before encrypting files.
query:
process where process.name in ("sc.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe") and
  (
    process.command_line like~ "*stop*WinDefend*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*stop*wscsvc*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*stop*VSS*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*stop*wbengine*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*stop*MsMpSvc*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*stop*Sense*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*stop*SecurityHealthService*" or
    (process.command_line like~ "*config*" and process.command_line like~ "*disabled*" and
      (process.command_line like~ "*WinDefend*" or process.command_line like~ "*wscsvc*" or
       process.command_line like~ "*VSS*" or process.command_line like~ "*wbengine*"))
  )
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: Taskkill Force Termination of Security Product Processes
description: Detects taskkill.exe with force flag (/F) targeting known AV/EDR agent process names. Forcibly terminating security product processes is a key technique to disable endpoint defenses prior to payload execution. Covers CrowdStrike Falcon, Microsoft Defender, SentinelOne, Carbon Black, and other major EDR agents.
query:
process where process.name == "taskkill.exe" and
  process.command_line like~ "*/F*" and
  (
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*MsMpEng*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*NisSrv*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*csfalconservice*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*SentinelAgent*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*SentinelServiceHost*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*cb.exe*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*xagt*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*bdservicehost*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*avguard*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*mcshield*" or
    process.command_line like~ "*/IM*SecurityHealthSystray*"
  )
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: Volume Shadow Copy and Backup Destruction Commands
description: Detects commands used to delete Volume Shadow Copies or disable backup recovery — one of the most reliable ransomware indicators. Covers vssadmin delete shadows, wmic shadowcopy delete, sc stop VSS, sc stop wbengine, and bcdedit recovery disable. Any match is a critical indicator of active ransomware or destructive malware.
query:
process where
  (
    process.name == "vssadmin.exe" and process.command_line like~ "*delete*shadows*"
  ) or
  (
    process.name == "wmic.exe" and process.command_line like~ "*shadowcopy*delete*"
  ) or
  (
    process.name == "sc.exe" and
    (
      process.command_line like~ "*stop*VSS*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*stop*wbengine*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*stop*SDRSVC*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*stop*swprv*"
    )
  ) or
  (
    process.name == "bcdedit.exe" and
    (
      process.command_line like~ "*recoveryenabled*no*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*"
    )
  )
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator

name: Service Recon to Service Control Behavioral Sequence
description: Detects the full attacker workflow: a process first enumerates security services via sc.exe query, then proceeds to issue stop or delete commands within 10 minutes. This high-fidelity sequence covers T1489 and T1562.001 pre-attack reconnaissance followed by execution. False positives are extremely rare; all matches should be investigated.
query:
sequence by host.id, process.parent.entity_id with maxspan=10m
  [process where process.name == "sc.exe" and process.command_line like~ "*query*" and
    (
      process.command_line like~ "*WinDefend*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*wscsvc*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*VSS*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*wbengine*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*Sense*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*SecurityHealth*"
    )
  ]
  [process where process.name in ("sc.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "taskkill.exe") and
    (
      process.command_line like~ "*stop*" or
      process.command_line like~ "*delete*" or
      (process.command_line like~ "*/F*" and process.command_line like~ "*/IM*")
    )
  ]
author: F0RT1KA Detection Rules Generator
